productDisplayName: Nike Men Solid Navy Blue Shorts
description: CompositionNavy blue shorts made of 86% polyester and 14% spandex Dri-Fit fabric, has an elasticated waist with a drawcord, built in briefs, mesh panels on the side seams, zippered pocket on the back and brand logo on the left legFitComfortWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not bleach, iron or dry cleanLine dryBuilt with the breathability and zero-distraction fit that athletes demand, these nike running shorts come in a body-friendly design. These high-performance shorts features Dri-Fit technology that wicks sweat away from the skin and keeps you dry and comfortable. Team it with t-shirts and track jackets.Model statisticsThe product is a size M with length 21" on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
